Email #1: December, 18, 2006
Subject Line: Todd Brown's LAST EVER Massage Marketing Newsletter - 12/19/06 5:48PM ET
Hey <$firstname$>,
I've got some crazy news that may shock
you a bit...
It's a bit sad, and at the same time, very,
very exciting!
After years of publishing our offline Massage
Marketing Gold Newsletter - what has become known
as one of the top business publications in the
entire massage profession - I have decided that
this month, December 2006, will be the very
last issue we publish.
Even though the MM Gold Newsletter is like my
baby, and has been the one place I've shared
some of my best marketing and practice-building
information, there's just no way I can continue
publishing it.
And, if that wasn't enough...
December 2006 will also be the very last Secret To
Their Massage Success program 'Grilling Call'.
I know this is probably a shocker to you, as
it is to most of the therapists receiving
this email.
It's painful for me to do this, and for me to
stop these 2 programs.
Fact is, I no longer have the time to do either
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 49 --

of those programs anymore.
All of my time is being soaked up with this
monumental, gigantic massage project I've
been working on for you, that is just a
few weeks away from *finally* being done.
This massive massage project has become known,
at the offices of GetMassageClients.com as...
** MASSAGE PROJECT X **
We haven't shared it with anyone.
Nobody.
It's been totally hush-hush.
Hence, the name MASSAGE PROJECT X.
What is it, you're wondering?
Well, I'm not going to tell you much about it right
now, for competitive protection, but I will tell
you that it's never been done before for massage
therapists, is desperately desired, and blows away
anything and everything I've ever done before
for massage marketing and practice-building.
MASSAGE PROJECT X is something I've wanted to
do for so long, because of how it's going to
revolutionize how massage therapists become
successful 'business owners', but didn't know
exactly how to pull it off.
$4,100.00 later, I now know, and it will
finally be ready for you in a few weeks.
If you've been with me for any significant length
of time then you know when it comes to creating
new tools and resources that make you more
money, I come up with the best of the best.
Well, MASSAGE PROJECT X beats everything I've
ever done before, hands down!
It's the culmination of everything I've done
for massage therapists up to this point.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 49 --

And, it's THAT GOOD (which you'll soon see)!
Anyway, as sad as it to see the MM Gold Newsletter
and the STTMS program come to an end, it's extremely
exciting to finally be just a couple of weeks
away from the long-anticipated release of
MASSAGE PROJECT X.
I'll be updating with critical information about
MASSAGE PROJECT X as we get closer to it's
release.
Talk to you soon,
Todd
P.S. Don't worry... even though we're working
like crazy on MASSAGE PROJECT X, and have had to
stop work on almost all else, we will still be
publishing our online email newsletter.
You'll continue to get that every week. :-)
Email #2: December, 19, 2006
Subject Line: The last bit of massage advice therapists will hear from Todd Brown
Hey <$firstname$>,
I want to share with you the last bit
of advice I published for massage therapists
in the final Massage Marketing Gold Newsletter.
First, though, I've got to clarify something...
After yesterday's email announcement about
the end of the Massage Marketing Gold Newsletter
and the Secret To Their Massage Success program,
there was a massive outcry from therapists
on our email list.
Some practitioners thought yesterday's email was
the end of GetMassageClients.com.
Let me clear this up right now...
WE'RE NOT GOING ANYWHERE
In fact, not only aren't we going anywhere, but
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 49 --

the whole reason for stopping the MM Gold Newsletter
and STTMS program is to *give you even more* of
what you need to become a successful therapist
even quicker.
I want to spend 99% of my time preparing for
the launch of something I believe is going to rock
the foundations of the massage profession - for
now titled Massage Project X.
Anyway, I just wanted to make sure you understood
that I wasn't going anywhere, and am in fact knee-deep
in preparing to give you even more than I ever
have before.
My goal for 2007 and Massage Project X is to
make 2007 the absolute best year of your life.
...the year you finally break out and create the
massage practice you've always dreamed of.
...the year you look back on as the one that
was the beginning of the an incredible massage
business and life for yourself.
More about that in future emails.
For now, I want to share with you the 'Final
Thoughts' section of this month's last-ever
Massage Marketing Gold Issue.
I felt the content was way too important
to not share it with you.
Please read it carefully.
-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
Reprinted from the December 2006
Massage Marketing Gold Newsletter
-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
Wow, I guess these really are my final
thoughts, huh?
Naaaaaa, far from it.
In fact, really, the objective of bringing
the MM Gold Newsletter to a close is to free
me up to give you even more of what you need
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 49 --

to become a super-successful massage therapist.
I've already told you how this will be
accomplished - Massage Project X.
But, for now, I think it's only fitting for me
to wrap up this Issue with one of the most
important bits of advice I can give you.
And, if you get nothing else out this month's
Issue (which would make me believe you didn't
read it), but you get this, I'll have done
my job, and then some.
And, without any fluff or pulling any punches,
here it is: don't sell yourself short in your
life!
Please, don't.
Don't let your life pass you by without you
becoming the person you're supposed to be.
Don't let your life pass you by without living
your dream.
And, I'm not talking new age stuff or destiny-stuff.
That's not what I'm talking about.
You know me.
I'm practical. (Well, most of the time). :-)
What I am talking about is you believing enough in
yourself to really go for it.
To really give 100% of yourself into creating the
life you've always wanted.
To me, there's nothing sadder than seeing someone
live their life on someone else's terms.
Seeing someone live their life based on someone
else's idea of what a great, fulfilling life
looks like.
At the end of the day, we only go through this crazy
life once.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 49 --

Only once!
Doesn't it make the most sense to live it in the
best possible way you can?
Doesn't it make the most sense give everything
you've got into living your life the way you would
want to live it?
Please, I can't stress it enough to you, you are more
than capable of creating that 'dream'.
You are.
And, anybody or anything that convinces you of
anything different is just feeding you a lie.
Don't let that happen.
Don't let anybody convince you of anything less that
what you are and can be.
Don't.
Don't let it happen to you.
Believe in yourself.
Recognize that it doesn't take genius or special talents
and abilities to create a super-successful massage practice
and live life on your own terms.
I can certainly attest to that.
No. It just takes determination and will, something you can
choose to have everyday.
And, that's how I want to wrap up the MM Gold Newsletter.
I want you to understand that success in life is all about
one thing - CHOICE.
You can CHOOSE everyday to do the things that build
your massage business and your life, or you can choose
to believe you're not capable, and accept what life gives you.
You can CHOOSE success by what you CHOOSE to do
everyday.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 49 --

Or, you can CHOOSE to just meander through life.
Please don't let that happen.
The choice really is yours.
It really is.
I just hope you make the right one.
- Todd Brown
-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

Email #4: December 29, 2007
Subject Line: <$firstname$>, your massage marketing is SCARING prospective clients away...
Hey <$firstname$>,
I've got a bet for you...
I bet you're unknowingly threatening
prospective clients with whatever marketing
you do in your practice, and scaring them into
*NOT* calling you for an appointment.
Don't think so?
Well, let me explain why it's most likely
the case...
It's no secret that people don't like being
'sold' or pressured into anything.
(It's something I just personally went
through when looking for a new vehicle
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 49 --

for my wife, Kellie. Uggh... the car
sales-guy and his schtick!)
It's something most people will avoid like the
plague. Even when they think they can get
something for free, they'll still avoid it if
there's a chance someone's going to try and
sell them something.
That's what makes having a non-threatening
method for prospective clients to respond to
your marketing and get to know you, so important.
If prospective clients or people interested in
massage think they are going to have to
speak with someone live on the phone to get a
free appointment or free massage or
free report (if you're lead generating), a
lot of people will not pick up the phone to
call, for fear of being asked to buy
something.
This is why massage marketing pieces that offer
anything free, but require prospective clients
to call you fail miserably.
They scare people!
People think when you get them
on the phone you are going to try and 'sell'
them on becoming a client or paying for
a bunch of massages.
The result?
People don't call, don't get to hear why
regular bodywork is so valuable, and don't
end up as your client.
It's also why ads that offer a non-threatening
form of contact work so well to generate leads
and then eventually new clients.
Because when you give people a way to get
more information about the value of massage
with you, in a way that eliminates the
possibility of being in an uncomfortable
'sales' environment, they become much, much
more likely to respond.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 49 --

An example of this is offering some type of
free massage report via a free recorded message
or via an Internet video.
(Speaking of Internet Videos... have you seen
my new 'Massage Movie' yet? If not, you can
take a peek here:
http://www.GetMassageClients.com/MassageMovie.htm
Those type of lead generation approaches offer
prospective clients the opportunity
to get more information about your practice
without having to be afraid of being put in
an uncomfortable 'sales' environment.
And, the outcome...
You get far more phone calls, leads and
new clients.
When you start including a non-threatening
form of contact in your massage marketing for
prospective clients, you will see a significant
leap in the number of leads you generate and new
clients you acquire.
Always remember, you want to make it as
easy and as comfortable as possible for
prospective clients to learn why they
should be getting regular bodywork,
and why they should be getting it with
you.
Talk soon,
Todd Brown
P.S. There is an insane buzz right now with
the therapists on our email list about
the 'Massage Movie' trailer I released on
Monday or this week (in preparation for
Massage Projet X).
If you haven't seen it yet, you can go here and
watch it right now:
http://www.GetMassageClients.com/MassageMovie.htm
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 49 --

(Be sure to turn your speakers up on your
computer.)
Email #5: December 30, 2006
Subject Line: FWD: <$firstname$>, use this quote (displayed on my desk) to plan 2007
12/30/06
TO: <$firstname$>
FR: Todd
RE: Something to think about...
Hey <$firstname$>,
Before 2007 is officially upon us, I wanted to
get this to you...
Sitting on a shelf, next to the desk I'm sitting
at right now, is a picture frame displaying a quote
I printed out earlier this year.
The quote has had a pretty profound impact
on me personally, and I wanted to share it with
you, while you're possibly doing some planning
for 2007.
Here's the quote (it's pretty deep)...
---
'Those who work with the elderly report that
at the end of life, the most common regret is
not over what we did, but what we failed to do:
the chance not taken, the business not started,
the invention not patented, the dream not
followed, the talent not nourished, the novel
not written, the product not tested, the trip
not taken, the apology not offered - so much
music that died, bottled up inside us, because
we were too timid to let it out!'
---
I don't remember where I initially read that,
or who's responsible for that bit of wisdom,
but it sure is true.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 49 --

So, as you plan out 2007 and your goals,
remember...
You'll have greater regrets over the things
you don't do, than you will over the things
you do.
I really wish you a happy and healthy new year,
Todd Brown :-)
P.S. To be completely honest with you, when I
first thought of putting together the little
Massage Movie coming attractions we did at
http://www.GetMassageClients.com/MassageMovie.htm
for the release of what's now known as Massage
Project X, I debated on not doing it because I
wondered how it would be received.
I was nervous people would think I'd lost
my mind. :-)
Then, I glanced over at that quote, and
thought about the regret I may have over
NOT doing it, and... welll... the rest is
history...
http://www.GetMassageClients.com/MassageMovie.htm

Email #12: January 16, 2007
Subject Line: Donald Trump taught Massage Marketing on Sunday
Hey <$firstname$>,
I couldn't believe it...
There was actually a powerful
massage marketing lesson given
during the last episode of Donald
Trump's Apprentice.
Did you see it?
It was a demonstration, right on television,
of why most massage marketing falls
flat on it's face.
Just in case you missed the episode
or didn't catch the lesson, let me
give you the quick overview...
The task the teams were assigned to
complete was to create a line of swim
suits, show them off for buyers during
a mock fashion show, and then see who
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 49 --

could sell the most to those company
buyers.
All was going well for one team, until
they got to the creation of their men's
swimsuits.
The person on the team responsible for the
design of the men's swim suits was a young,
well-built, flamboyant guy who designed and
created a swimsuit based on the likes and
tastes of his own market demographic.
The end result was a pink, flowered, tight
spandex suit that only an extremely 'gifted'
man would feel comfortable wearing (if you
know what I mean).
Let's just say that when he showed it off
at the fashion show, everyone got to know him
a little bit better than they hoped for.
Well, to say his team flopped in trying to sell
their men's suits to the buyers, would be a gross
understatement.
They sold less than $400 of those men's suits
to the buyers. And, personally, I'd like to
know which buyer spent the $400 bucks.
Anyway, back in the Trump boardroom, the Donald
and Ivanka (his very savvy 23-year old daughter)
let this guy have it.
When asked what he was thinking when he designed
a suit so feminine, so tight, and so opposite-of
anything-masculine, the designer said, 'There is
definitely a market for this suit out there.'
To which Ivanka replied, 'There may be buyers
for that type of swim suit out there, but that
wasn't what the buyers you were selling to were
looking for.'
And, right there is an incredible massage
marketing lesson for you to grasp.
Far too many massage therapists put out marketing
materials based on what THEY think it should
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 49 --

look like and say.
They don't give thought to what message they
should communicate in their marketing based
on what their BUYERS want to hear.
At the end of the day, it's critical for you
to remember that your marketing message should
always be tailored to appeal to what your target
market is thinking, looking for, afraid of, and
desiring.
Your marketing should never be about what you
want, or what you want it to say or look like.
That's what the guy did from the Apprentice and
it's what cost his team the victory and got him
fired.
No... what you need to do is make sure all of
the messages you're communicating to clients
and prospective clients is done in a way that
is most appealing to THEM.
Always remember... you are NOT your clients
and prospective clients.
Just because certain things would motivate you
to come in for bodywork doesn't mean it's going
to motivate your target market.
I guess what I'm saying is...
Don't create a pink swim suit for men and
try to sell it to people just because you like
it and think it looks good.
Find out what THEY want.
Find out what motivate THEM.
Then, craft your massage marketing materials
around that.
Done correctly, you'll create a response to
your marketing unlike anything you've experienced
before.
This is why as part of your $9.97 membership to
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 49 --

MassageBusinessUniversity.com I'll be showing
you real-life massage marketing critiques every
few weeks.
I'll be taking actual massage marketing pieces
being used by other massage therapists, and dissecting
them for you, showing you what should be fixed, tweaked,
taken out, put in, etc.
This way you'll know exactly how to create
the most effective massaage marketing pieces
possible for your practice.
You will actually get a firsthand view of what
highly-effective massage marketing looks like, as well
as what poorly designed 'pink swim suit' massage
marketing looks like.
But, here's the catch... (and I say this for you)...
If you're at all interested in getting one of the
$9.97 memberships into MassageBusinessUniversity.com
on January 24th when we go live, your best shot
is to be on the early notification list.
If you haven't yet signed-up for it, you can
get your name on the list by going here now:
http://www.GetMassageClients.com/MassageProjectXRevealed
As of right now, we only have 1000 membership spots
(actually more like 986 with the world-class faculty
we've assembled for you).
So, on January 24th it really will be first come
first serve.
Again, if you haven't signed up yet, you can sign up
for the early notification list if you want to receive
an email the moment enrollment into MBU goes live.
http://www.GetMassageClients.com/MassageProjectXRevealed
Enjoy,
Todd Brown
P.S. If there was any one thing to remember from this
email, it would be this...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 49 --

The tighter you match your massage marketing message
to the target market you're trying to attract into your
practice, the better the response you're going to get.
The broader your message and the less targeted to a
specific audience, the worse the response you're
going to get.
It's all about showing people how you and your
bodywork can give them exactly what THEY want.
Again, that's what the massage Dashboard does
for you.
Go here to get your name on the early notification
list for MBU:
http://www.GetMassageClients.com/MassageProjectXRevealed

What MassageBusinessUniversity.com is NOT!
As a member of MBU, you will have access to the latest breakthrough massage
marketing and business-building strategies used by the most successful (and
highest earning) massage therapists. But before you consider becoming a part
of our community, let me also explain what we DON'T OFFER:
Basic, boring marketing tips (such as how to hand out your business
cards or putting flyers on trees!). If you want these ineffective tips, please
DON'T JOIN
Massage Modality & Technique articles. Our 100% focus is teaching you
how to rapidly build and sustain a super-successful massage practice and
make significantly more money as a massage therapist - period! If this is
something that offends you, please don't join!
'Fluff' filled articles with the same old generic business and marketing tips
you'd find in newstand magazines. We give you only REAL, MEATY
CONTENT!
If all you're concerned with is how to deliver a great bodywork session, and
you're not interested in discovering the secret to generating maximum financial
success and freedome as a massage therapist - then this site isn't for you.
Good, you're still reading this. That means I've done my job and gotten rid of
the 'in-the-box-thinking' therapists who wouldn't be a good fit for our motivated,
excited, and business-minded community of practitioners.

By becoming a member of MBU you'll receive instant UNLIMITED ACCESS to
all of our online content. You can watch all of the video tutorials, lisen to all of
the audio recordings, read all of the articles and special reports, view the case
studies, exhibits, and critiques, and exchange ideas and support with other
like-minded therapists. It's perfect for the massage therapist looking to really
grow the size of their practice and income!
